description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex XSIAM CLI as part of an automation or in a playbook.

outputs.description: Event type. SaasSecurity.Event.item_type Item type (File, Folder, or User).
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.log_type

outputs.description: Name of the file, folder, or user associated with the event. SaasSecurity.Event.item_unique_id Unique ID number for an asset’s related asset.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.item_name

outputs.description: Cloud app user that performed the action. SaasSecurity.Event.source_ip Original session source IP address.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.user

outputs.description: Location of the cloud app user that performed the event. SaasSecurity.Event.action Action performed.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.location

outputs.description: Serial number of the organization using the service (tenant). SaasSecurity.Event.cloud_app_instance Cloud app name (not cloud app type).
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.serial

outputs.description: Date ISO8601 timestamp to show when the event occurred. SaasSecurity.Event.severity
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.timestamp

outputs.description: Exposure level (public, external, company, or internal). SaasSecurity.Event.asset_id The asset ID.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.exposure

outputs.description: The item owner. SaasSecurity.Event.container_name Item’s container name.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.item_owner

outputs.description: Item creator. SaasSecurity.Event.occurrences_by_rule Number of times the asset violated the policy.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.item_creator

outputs.description: Violated policy’s name. SaasSecurity.Event.incident_owner Incident owner.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.policy_rule_name

outputs.description: Incident category. SaasSecurity.Event.item_creator_email Item creator’s email.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.incident_category

outputs.description: Action taken. SaasSecurity.Event.action_taken_by Action taken by.
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.action_taken

outputs.description: Name of field (optional). SaasSecurity.Event.resource_value_old Old resource value. (optional).
outputs.name: SaasSecurity.Event.field
